#  Review Sub-Tier Lien Waivers as an Invoice Administrator 
#####  General Availability in Select Markets (United States)
![Flag Us](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eb8f21ce49403a47d7bb5a0cedc7e0e9/7c0ec0977e654cc6bc9f3d8efa80fbe3/flag-us.png?fm=webp&h=14) [Procore Pay ](https://www.procore.com/pay) is available in the United States. It is designed for General Contractors and Owner-Builders who act as their own General Contractors on a job. Procore Pay extends the [Invoice Management](https://www.procore.com/invoice-management) functionality in the Procore web application to handle the payment process between general and specialty contractors.
##  Background 
An invoice administrator for the payor reviews submitted sub-tier waivers after:
  * An invoice contact uploads and submits a signed sub-tier lien waiver with a subcontractor. See [Upload Sub-Tier Waivers to a Subcontractor Invoice as an Invoice Contact](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-user-guide/upload-sub-tier-waivers).
  * A subcontractor electronically signs a sub-tier waiver lien waiver in Procore Pay. See [Request a Signature from a Sub-Tier Waiver Contact as a Payee](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/request-a-signature-from-a-sub-tier-waiver-contact-as-a-payee).


If a waiver is correct, you can approve it. If the waiver is incorrect, you can request a revision.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/permissions)


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Enable Sub-Tier Waivers on Project Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-sub-tier-waivers)
  * [Add Invoice Contacts to a Purchase Order or Subcontract](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/add-invoice-contacts)
  * [Create a Subcontractor Invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/create-subcontractor-invoices)
  * [Upload Sub-Tier Waivers to a Subcontractor Invoice as an Invoice Contact](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-user-guide/upload-sub-tier-waivers)


##  Video 
##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Invoicing** tool.
  2. Click the **Subcontractor** tab.
  3. Locate the invoice to open in the table.
  4. Click the **Lien Rights** tab.
  5. Depending on the lien waivers that your team collects, you will see one or more of the following cards on the invoice: 
#####  Tip
**How do we decide what type of lien waivers to collect?** Your project team makes that decision. Your team can show or hide these cards on the project's invoices on the Invoicing Settings page. To learn more, see [Configure Settings: Invoicing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/configure-settings-invoicing).
     * **Unconditional Sub-Tier Waivers for the Previous Invoice**. When you see this card, your team collects signed unconditional sub-tier waivers for the previous billing period. An invoice contact must first upload the signed sub-tier waivers with their subcontractor invoice for the current _Open_ billing period. See [Upload Sub-Tier Waivers to a Subcontractor Invoice as an Invoice Contact](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-user-guide/upload-sub-tier-waivers).
     * **Unconditional Sub-Tier Waivers for this Invoice**. When you see this card, your team collects signed unconditional sub-tier waivers for the current _Open_ billing period. An invoice contact must first upload the signed sub-tier waivers with their subcontractor invoice for the current _Open_ billing period. See [Upload Sub-Tier Waivers to a Subcontractor Invoice as an Invoice Contact](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-user-guide/upload-sub-tier-waivers).
     * **Conditional Sub Tier Waivers for this Invoice**. When you see this card, your team collects signed conditional sub-tier waivers for the current _Open_ billing period. An invoice contact must first upload signed sub-tier waivers with their subcontractor invoice for the current _Open_ billing period. See [Upload Sub-Tier Waivers to a Subcontractor Invoice as an Invoice Contact](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-user-guide/upload-sub-tier-waivers).
     * **Sub-Tier Information for this Invoice**. When you see this card, sub-tier waivers aren't being collected. There will be no waivers to review in this card.
  6. Scroll to the card that contains the sub-tier waivers to review. Once sent by an invoice contact, the waivers are placed in the _Review Pending_ status.
  7. In the **Waivers** column, click **Review**.   
  
![Review Sub Tier Waiver](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/fe8a90dd5c9015ad009c1a8e4bb0cc67/02c65171fba3c56ba2e16faaa013eb8e/review-sub-tier-waiver.png?fm=webp)  
  
This opens the waiver in the attachment viewer. The Details pane is active. 
#####  Notes
In the **Details** pane, you can also:
     * Click the **Download** ![Icon Download Cloud](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/2e19fa801eec8349afb1bedda0f7fc83/68221957a68806112406f3c6ce7bfdc7/icon-download-cloud.png?fm=webp&h=19) icon to download a copy of the file.
     * Edit the value in the **Amount Billed This Invoice** field and the **Billing Type** setting.
![Edit Amount Billed This Invoice Billing Type](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7307408fbf718811308967107632e67f/f0d0ea0ee00200560f30aac2a58a31aa/edit-amount-billed-this-invoice-billing-type.png?fm=webp)  

  8. Review the file and its details.   
Next, request a revision or approve a waiver.


### Request a Revision
If the waiver is missing information or a signature, you can request a revision:
  1. In the Details pane, click **Request Revision**.   
  
![Request Revision Button](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ba95202b9ace1a55ff20c4096f5b6512/87725ee2d62d452027f03eceba172ffb/request-revision-button.png?fm=webp)  
  
This opens the Request Revision window.
  2. In the **Reason for Revision** box, enter an explanation for the request. Include any details about the revision request for the waiver contact.  
  
![Request Revision Window](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/efa87020ebb74c9feba3b35e80b5648a/71b67097dee53665f836ce2e179f2aad/request-revision-window.png?fm=webp)
  3. Click **Request**.   
Procore Pay notifies the invoice contact of the request by email.


### Approve a Waiver
To approve the submitted sub-tier waiver, click **Approve** in the Details pane. This changes the status to _Approved_.
![Approve Button](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/14c6a7ff2ac61a2c5d01d179670e32ea/149bbd30d49b3865f140cce07d2f298b/approve-button.png?fm=webp)
Once _Approved_ , the sub-tier waiver requirement for the invoice is met. See [Configure Payment Requirements](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/configure-payment-requirements).
##  Next Steps 
  * [Create a Subcontractor Invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/create-subcontractor-invoices)
  * [Generate Lien Waivers on Project Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/generate-lien-waivers)


## See Also
  * [Enable Sub-Tier Waivers on Subcontractor Invoices as an Invoice Administrator](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/enable-sub-tier-waivers-on-subcontractor-invoices-as-an-invoice-administrator)
  * [Upload Sub-Tier Waivers to a Subcontractor Invoice as an Invoice Contact](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/upload-sub-tier-waivers-to-a-subcontractor-invoice-as-an-invoice-contact)
  * [Enable Lien Waivers & Set Default Templates on Projects](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/enable-lien-waivers-and-set-default-templates-on-projects)
title: Review Sub-Tier Lien Waivers as an Invoice Administrator
description: To review submitted sub-tier lien waivers for a subcontractor invoice as an invoice administrator.
